title: loxocarpus coodei
intro: Loxocarpus coodei, a plant species found in New Guinea, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The extracts of this plant have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The herbal preparation of Loxocarpus coodei typically involves drying and grinding the plant material into a powder, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or topical applications.
